chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD. C.P No.D-2250 of 2018 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For orders on office objection 2. For hearing of MA 9014/18 3. For hearing of main case. 06.03.2019 Mr. Raja H. R Naurang advocate for petitioner. -.-.-. Learned counsel submits that although he has not filed the power but has been instructed by the petitioner to represent him in the petition. Petitioner however is called absent. We have seen this petition, the petitioner is asking for recovery of some balance amount, 30% commission, etc. which controversy factual in nature cannot be adjudicated upon under the writ jurisdiction of this court under Article 199 of the Constitution of Islamic Republic of Pakistan, 1973. In the circumstances, we find this petition palpably not maintainable and accordingly dismiss it in limine alongwith listed application leaving the petitioner to avail the remedy, if any, in accordance with law. JUDGE JUDGE Ali Haider
